categories.notes: Imports, runtime config, generated entrypoints, build inputs, or shipped scripts that actively resolve policy.git.
Tests and e2e fixtures are not runtime consumers, but stale policy.git dependency fixtures can preserve false compatibility unless explicitly handled.
requiredEvidence: executable check or owner blocking reason

categories.notes: Past reports, logs, transcripts, archived manifests, and provenance evidence must not be deleted from trace, but do not keep policy.git physically alive.
ADR prose references are governance rationale/history unless the same path is also an active runtime or test/e2e consumer.
Unclassified grep hits and ambiguous refs remain blockers until a classifier records evidence.

mustFailIf: raw grep hit count is used as active dependency count
historical-evidence or adr-mention is counted as active blocker without runtime/test evidence
test-fixture-e2e refs are neither updated nor marked fixture-only with proof
gates.passWhen: zero unresolved active-runtime, unknown, and unhandled test-fixture-e2e refs remain
all discovered refs have classified retirement effects and every blocking category has accepted disposition evidence

purpose: Define which policy.git references block physical repo retirement and which must remain immutable trace only.

expectedGateRule: Each counterexample named by the projection contract must name an expectedGate. The expectedGate must be implemented with executable evidence or explicitly blocking with owner and reason.

expectedGates.reason: contract exists; executable checker not implemented in package yet
contract exists; live classifier/checker must distinguish blocker evidence from current truth
contract exists; native row validator not implemented yet
consumer classification and migration evidence checker not implemented yet
projection contract forbids the span family; executable schema check not implemented yet
cutover gate checker must prove old-policy-repo-consumers-zero, canonical-bootstrap-kernel, and nix-consumer-cutover before deletion approval

mustFailIf: gateImplementationStatus is neither implemented nor blocking
blocking row lacks owner or reason
gates.passWhen: every counterexample has expectedGate plus implemented evidence, or explicit blocking owner and reason accepted by governance

purpose: Make counterexample coverage an executable or explicitly blocked acceptance gate instead of an enumerated checklist.
